executiveSummary:
Apex AI Solutions is pleased to present this comprehensive proposal for digital marketing and conversion funnel optimization services tailored specifically for Elizabeth Casanova's paralegal services. Based on our analysis of your current Texas-wide accident support platform, we have identified significant opportunities to increase lead generation, consultation bookings, and ultimately, client acquisition.

PROJECTED RESULTS:
• 3-5x increase in qualified leads within 6 months
• 8-12% conversion rate (vs. industry standard 2-5%)
• 50-70% reduction in cost per acquired client
• Scalable growth with measurable ROI at every stage

We offer TWO FLEXIBLE ENGAGEMENT MODELS designed to align with your business goals and budget: (1) Modular Investment Model with tiered service levels, and (2) Performance-Based Commission Model with shared risk and reward.
scope: Our comprehensive digital marketing and funnel optimization program includes: Website Optimization, Analytics & Tracking Infrastructure, CRM Integration, Content Marketing, Social Proof Enhancement, SEO & PPC Advertising, AI-Powered Automation, and Continuous Optimization with transparent reporting.

modules.title: TIER 1: Foundation
modules.description: $2,500/month - Best for businesses starting digital marketing or with limited budgets. Includes website conversion optimization, analytics setup, basic SEO (10 keywords), content creation (2 blogs/month), email automation, and monthly reporting with 1 strategy call.

modules.title: TIER 2: Growth (Recommended)
modules.description: $5,500/month + $2,000 managed ad spend - Best for businesses ready to scale comprehensively. Everything in Tier 1 PLUS advanced SEO (25 keywords), Google & Facebook ads management, bilingual chatbot, CRM setup, call tracking, 10 A/B tests/month, bi-weekly strategy calls. ESTIMATED: 300-500 monthly qualified leads, 8-10% conversion, 5-8x ROI.

modules.title: TIER 3: Elite
modules.description: $9,500/month + $5,000 managed ad spend - Best for aggressive growth and market domination. Everything in Tier 2 PLUS premium SEO (50+ keywords), multi-platform advertising, 8 blogs + 4 videos/month, dedicated account manager, video testimonial production, 20+ A/B tests/month, weekly strategy calls, priority support. ESTIMATED: 600-1,000+ monthly qualified leads, 10-14% conversion, 8-12x ROI.

modules.title: Performance-Based Commission Model
modules.description: ZERO UPFRONT COSTS - Pay only for qualified leads. We cover all setup, technology, and advertising costs. Pricing: $125/lead (1-100 leads), $100/lead (101-250 leads), $85/lead (251+ leads). Includes all Tier 3 Elite services + unlimited ad budget. 12-month commitment with 90-day ramp-up period. GUARANTEE: Minimum 50 qualified leads/month after Month 3 or you pay nothing.

deliveryModels.title: Modular Investment Model
deliveryModels.description: Predictable monthly costs with ability to scale services as your business grows.

deliveryModels.title: Performance-Based Commission
deliveryModels.description: Align our success directly with yours - we only earn when you acquire qualified leads.
features: Zero upfront costs and setup fees

timeline.description: Weeks 1-2: Discovery, access provisioning, competitor analysis, technology installation. Weeks 3-4: Website optimizations, tracking live, CRM configured, campaigns created. DELIVERABLES: Live tracking dashboard, configured CRM, 3-month content calendar, campaign proposals.

Month 2: SEO optimizations, blog publication begins, PPC campaigns launch, social advertising, email automation. Month 3: A/B test results, performance analysis, budget reallocation, chatbot refinements. DELIVERABLES: 8-10 blog posts, 3-5 active campaigns, 100+ qualified leads (projected), first strategy report.

Scaling successful campaigns, advanced automation, video content production, retargeting expansion, conversion rate optimization. DELIVERABLES: 300+ monthly qualified leads (projected), optimized funnel (8-10% rate), comprehensive 6-month performance report.
Monthly A/B testing, quarterly comprehensive audits, technology updates, market trend adaptation, competitor monitoring. DELIVERABLES: Sustained growth and maximized ROI.

client: Timely response to leads (within 24 hours recommended)
Participation in monthly strategy calls (1-2 hours)
Access to website, analytics, and social accounts
Payment of invoices per agreed terms

supportTerms:
COMPREHENSIVE SUPPORT INCLUDED:

Weekly: Automated dashboard email (Mondays), key metrics snapshot, alert notifications

Monthly: Comprehensive performance report, strategy review meeting (video call), next month's plan and budget, A/B test results and insights

Quarterly: Executive summary presentation, ROI analysis and forecasting, technology and strategy audit, annual planning

24/7 Dashboard Access: Real-time performance monitoring, lead generation pipeline, active campaign status, budget utilization, conversion funnel visualization
paymentTerms:
MODULAR MODEL: Setup fee due upon contract signing. Monthly fees due on 1st of each month. Advertising budgets managed separately. Payment methods: ACH, wire transfer, credit card (+3% processing fee).

COMMISSION MODEL: Invoiced monthly based on delivered qualified leads. Payment due within 15 days of invoice. Lead counts verified via shared dashboard. Disputed leads resolved within 48 hours.

CONTRACT DURATION: Modular (6 months minimum), Commission (12 months minimum). Auto-renewal terms apply. Written notice required for cancellation.
